task_completion.description: Verify that the PDB structure 4UN3 is loaded into the PyMOL application.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The PyMOL GUI is open with a 3D macromolecular structure visible. The identifier '4UN3' should be visible in the right-hand object menu or the command line history.

task_completion.description: Verify that the PAM-interacting Arginines (1333, 1335) and their target Guanines on the non-target DNA strand are identified and visualized.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The PyMOL viewer is zoomed in on the protein-DNA interface, likely showing specific residues in stick representation. Residue selections or labels for Arg 1333, Arg 1335, and the corresponding Guanines (DG 6, DG 7) should be visible.

task_completion.description: Verify that the two specific hydrogen-bond distances are measured between the Arginine sidechain nitrogens and the Guanine Hoogsteen edge atoms.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Dashed lines indicating distance measurements are visible between the Arginine and Guanine residues in the PyMOL viewer. The numerical values displayed on these lines must be between 2.5 and 4.5 Angstroms.

task_completion.description: Verify that a publication-quality figure highlighting the interface is saved to the specified path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Evidence of the image being saved to '/home/ga/PyMOL_Data/images/cas9_pam_recognition.png'. This could be a 'png' command in the PyMOL console, a file save dialog, or the resulting image file visible in a file manager or image viewer.

task_completion.description: Verify that the structural report is written to the correct path and contains all required analytical details.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal displaying the contents of '/home/ga/PyMOL_Data/cas9_pam_report.txt'. The text must explicitly include: PDB ID 4UN3, chain assignments (sgRNA=A, Cas9=B, Target DNA=C, Non-target DNA=D), Arg residues 1333 and 1335, Guanine residues 6 and 7, and the two distance measurements (between 2.5 and 4.5 A).

integrity.description: Verify that the agent actually used PyMOL to analyze the structure and generate the image.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent actively interacting with the PyMOL GUI or its internal command line to manipulate the view and take measurements, rather than just executing a pre-written script blindly.

integrity.description: Verify that the distance measurements in the text report match the actual measurements taken in PyMOL.
integrity.visual_evidence: The numerical distance values written in the text report should exactly match the values shown on the dashed measurement lines in the PyMOL viewer.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent derived the report details from actual structural analysis rather than external knowledge.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent should not instantly create the text report with the correct answers (like Chain A, B, C, D and Guanines 6, 7) without first loading, inspecting, and measuring the structure in PyMOL.

privileged_info_for_vlm: PDB ID: 4UN3. Chain assignments: sgRNA is Chain A, Cas9 Protein is Chain B, Target DNA is Chain C, Non-Target DNA is Chain D. The PAM-interacting Arginines are B:1333 and B:1335. The target Guanines on the non-target DNA strand are D:6 and D:7. The true hydrogen-bond distances are approximately 2.72 and 2.59 Angstroms, and must fall between 2.5 and 4.5 Angstroms.
